popularStory.headline: Biography
popularStory.description: Archibald Douglas was the son of William Douglas of Douglas[1] He is named as such in a charter dated about 1198, in which he resigned the lands of Hailes.[1] He succeeded his father and is styled Sir …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas於1178年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安苗斯頓時，他的父親William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas28歲，母親Margaret Kersdale of Moray26歲。他於1220年之前與Lady Margaret Crawford在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1240年7月18日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯享年62歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛包爾梅露絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas于1178年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安苗斯頓时，他的父亲William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas28岁，母亲Margaret Kersdale of Moray26岁。他于1220年之前与Lady Margaret Crawford在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1240年7月18日在苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯享年62岁，埋葬在苏格兰洛包爾梅露絲。

en.Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scotland, Uni: Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas was born in 1178, in Hermiston, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Kersdale of Moray, was 26. He married Lady Margaret Crawford before 1220, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 18 July 1240, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Melrose, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas est né en 1178, à Hermiston, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Kersdale of Moray, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Crawford avant 1220, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 18 juillet 1240, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Melrose, Roxburghshire, Écosse.

de.Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scotland, Uni: Melrose, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas 1178 in Hermiston, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Kersdale of Moray 26. Er hat vor 1220 in Scotland Lady Margaret Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 18. Juli 1240 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Melrose, Roxburghshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas è nato il nel 1178 nel Hermiston, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Kersdale of Moray, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Crawford prima del 1220, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 18 luglio 1240, nel Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Melrose, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglasが1178年にスコットランドミドロスアンハーミストンで生まれた時，父William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglasは28歳，母Margaret Kersdale of Morayは26歳であった。1220年以前にスコットランドでLady Margaret Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1240年7月18日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスで62歳で死去し，スコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアメルローゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas(이)가 1178년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 허미스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Kersdale of Moray(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1220년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Lady Margaret Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1240년 7월 18일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 멜로즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas nasceu em 1178, em Hermiston, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Kersdale of Moray, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Crawford antes 1220, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 18 de julho de 1240, em Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Melrose, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas родился в 1178 г. в местности хирмистон, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Kersdale of Moray, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Crawford перед 1220 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 18 июля 1240 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности мелрос, роксбургшир, Шотландия.
